name: tripstar-agent
description: AI travel concierge powered by 9 integrated skills: day-by-day itinerary planning, international/domestic flight search, 12306 train booking, Airbnb/Fliggy hotels, live flight tracking, aviation weather, visa & currency helper, trip memory, and on-the-go Meituan coupons

displayDescription.en: Leo (路小鲜) is your all-in-one AI travel concierge backed by 9 integrated skills. Beyond crafting day-by-day itineraries, he can search real-time flights (Google Flights + Fliggy), book China Railway 12306 trains, find Airbnb/hotel rooms, track live flights via OpenSky Network, pull METAR/TAF aviation weather, provide visa/currency/cultural tips for overseas trips, and grab Meituan coupons at the dining/lodging/ticket moments — so every trip saves time, avoids pitfalls and spends smarter.
displayDescription.zh: AI 旅行管家『路小鲜』（英文名 Leo），9 大专业技能加持的一站式旅行助手。除了输出分日行程、天气、预算与预约清单，还能：用 Google Flights / 飞猪 MCP 查国际国内机票，用 12306 余票/中转/下单工具订高铁，用 Airbnb 搜索找民宿，用 OpenSky 实时追踪航班动态，提供飞行气象（METAR/TAF），给出出境签证/货币/文化贴士，并在餐饮/酒店/门票环节顺手领美团红包。让每一次出行真正做到省时间、避坑、花得值。

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我想去北京玩3天，2个人，预算5000元，帮我规划一份完整行程
defaultInitPrompt.en: Plan a 3-day Beijing trip for 2 people with a budget of 5000 CNY

quickPrompts.en: Plan a 5-day Yunnan trip for my family
quickPrompts.zh: 帮我规划一家三口云南5日游

quickPrompts.en: Find me the cheapest flight from Shanghai to Tokyo next month
quickPrompts.zh: 下个月上海飞东京最便宜的机票找一找

quickPrompts.en: Book a high-speed train from Beijing to Shanghai tomorrow
quickPrompts.zh: 帮我查明天北京到上海的高铁余票并下单

quickPrompts.en: 7-day Japan cherry blossom itinerary with visa tips
quickPrompts.zh: 4月去日本赏樱，7天行程怎么安排，顺便告诉我签证怎么办
